## 🚀 Installation

Latest release asset base:
```text
https://bubblehub.dev/download/latest
```

Specific release asset base:
```text
https://bubblehub.dev/download/vX.Y.Z
```

Linux curl installer:
```bash
curl -fsSL https://bubblehub.dev/install.sh | bash
```

Linux Debian package:
```bash
curl -LO https://bubblehub.dev/download/latest/BubbleHub-X.Y.Z-x64.deb
sudo apt install ./BubbleHub-X.Y.Z-x64.deb
```

Open the BubbleHub Control Center Tauri desktop app after installing:
```bash
bubblehub app
```

Windows PowerShell installer:
```powershell
irm https://bubblehub.dev/install.ps1 | iex
```

The Windows installer uses WSL for the Linux runtime and creates BubbleHub Control Center Start Menu and Desktop shortcuts that launch the desktop app.

Windows `.exe` bootstrapper:
```powershell
irm https://bubblehub.dev/download/latest/BubbleHub-X.Y.Z-x64.exe -OutFile BubbleHub-X.Y.Z-x64.exe
.\BubbleHub-X.Y.Z-x64.exe
```
